name: Soujanya Reddy
html:
Soujanya
Reddy
css: .vsr-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #0d0d1a; overflow: hidden; } .vsr-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, #1a003a 0%, #0d0d1a 70%); animation: vsr-pulse 4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes vsr-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.7; } } .vsr-content { position: relative; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 10%; } .vsr-letter { font-family: Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 5vw, 2.8rem); font-weight: bold; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6ec7, #a78bfa, #38bdf8); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; animation: vsr-float 3s ease-in-out infinite; display: inline-block; } .vsr-letter:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0s; } .vsr-letter:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; } .vsr-letter:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; } .vsr-letter:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.45s; } .vsr-letter:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.6s; } .vsr-letter:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.75s; } .vsr-letter:nth-child(7) { animation-delay: 0.9s; } .vsr-letter:nth-child(8) { animation-delay: 1.05s; } .vsr-d1 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #facc15, #f97316, #ef4444); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .vsr-d1:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 1.2s; } .vsr-d1:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 1.35s; } .vsr-d1:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 1.5s; } .vsr-d1:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 1.65s; } .vsr-d1:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 1.8s; } @keyframes vsr-float { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } 50% { transform: translateY(-8px); } }
